name: Corn Flake Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind corn flakes in a food processor until they are finely ground.
2. Add sugar and process just until combined.
3. Add half of the cream cheese and process.
4. Add the remaining cream cheese and process.
5. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with non-stick cooking spray.
6. Pour in the crust mixture.
7. Gently press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and sides to form the crust.
8. Chill before adding filling.
